code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Generate a fluent, single‑sentence description from a list of triples."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Group predicates by subject to allow richer aggregation
    from collections import defaultdict
    grouped = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        grouped[t.subject].append((t.predicate, t.object))

    sentences = []
    for subject, attrs in grouped.items():
        # Convert list of (predicate, object) to a dict for easy lookup
        attr_dict = {p: o for p, o in attrs}
        parts = [subject]

        # Core descriptive elements – order matters for readability
        if "occupation" in attr_dict:
            parts.append(f"works as {attr_dict['occupation']}")
        if "nationality" in attr_dict:
            parts.append(attr_dict["nationality"])
        if "origin" in attr_dict:
            parts.append(f"from {attr_dict['origin']}")
        if "birthDate" in attr_dict:
            bd = f"born on {attr_dict['birthDate']}"
            if "birthPlace" in attr_dict:
                bd += f" in {attr_dict['birthPlace']}"
            parts.append(bd)
        elif "birthPlace" in attr_dict:
            parts.append(f"born in {attr_dict['birthPlace']}")
        if "deathDate" in attr_dict:
            dd = f"died on {attr_dict['deathDate']}"
            if "deathPlace" in attr_dict:
                dd += f" in {attr_dict['deathPlace']}"
            parts.append(dd)
        elif "deathPlace" in attr_dict:
            parts.append(f"died in {attr_dict['deathPlace']}")
        if "genre" in attr_dict:
            parts.append(f"known for {attr_dict['genre']} music")
        if "instrument" in attr_dict:
            parts.append(f"plays the {attr_dict['instrument']}")
        if "associatedBand/associatedMusicalArtist" in attr_dict:
            parts.append(f"associated with {attr_dict['associatedBand/associatedMusicalArtist']}")
        if "recordLabel" in attr_dict:
            parts.append(f"signed to {attr_dict['recordLabel']}")
        if "activeYearsStartYear" in attr_dict:
            start = attr_dict["activeYearsStartYear"]
            end = attr_dict.get("activeYearsEndYear")
            years = f"active from {start}"
            if end:
                years += f" to {end}"
            parts.append(years)

        # Add any remaining predicates that were not specially handled
        handled = {
            "occupation", "nationality", "origin", "birthDate", "birthPlace",
            "deathDate", "deathPlace", "genre", "instrument",
            "associatedBand/associatedMusicalArtist", "recordLabel",
            "activeYearsStartYear", "activeYearsEndYear"
        }
        # Mapping of predicates to natural‑language phrase generators
        predicate_phrases = {
            "background": lambda o: f"with a background as {o}",
            "alternativeName": lambda o: f"also known as {o}",
            "birthYear": lambda o: f"born in {o}",
            "deathYear": lambda o: f"died in {o}",
            "musicFusionGenre": lambda o: f"fuses {o}",
            "musicSubgenre": lambda o: f"subgenre {o}",
            "stylisticOrigin": lambda o: f"originating from {o}",
            "language": lambda o: f"speaks {o}",
            "officialLanguage": lambda o: f"official language is {o}",
            "derivative": lambda o: f"derived into {o}",
            "location": lambda o: f"located in {o}",
            "governingBody": lambda o: f"governed by {o}",
            "leader": lambda o: f"led by {o}",
            "leaderTitle": lambda o: f"leader title {o}",
            "country": lambda o: f"is in {o}",
            "ethnicGroup": lambda o: f"ethnic group {o}",
            "parentCompany": lambda o: f"parent company {o}",
            "bandMember": lambda o: f"has member {o}",
            "capital": lambda o: f"capital {o}",
            "anthem": lambda o: f"anthem {o}",
            "currency": lambda o: f"currency {o}",
            "demonym": lambda o: f"demonym {o}",
            "isPartOf": lambda o: f"is part of {o}",
            "distributingCompany": lambda o: f"distributed by {o}",
            "training": lambda o: f"trained at {o}",
            "populationDensity": lambda o: f"population density {o}",
            "meaning": lambda o: f"means {o}",
            "longName": lambda o: f"long name {o}",
            "areaTotal": lambda o: f"covers an area of {o}",
            "foundingDate": lambda o: f"founded on {o}",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda o: f"elevation {o} meters",
            "postalCode": lambda o: f"postal code {o}",
        }
        for p, o in attrs:
            if p in handled:
                continue
            if p in predicate_phrases:
                parts.append(predicate_phrases[p](o))
            else:
                parts.append(f"{p} {o}")

        # Join the parts into a fluent clause for this subject
        sentence = ", ".join(parts)
        sentences.append(sentence)

    # Combine all subject clauses into one complex sentence
    # Join clauses with commas and add a final "and" for readability
    if not sentences:
        return ""
    cleaned = [s.rstrip('.') for s in sentences]
    if len(cleaned) == 1:
        return cleaned[0] + "."
    # Insert "and" before the last clause
    combined = ", ".join(cleaned[:-1]) + ", and " + cleaned[-1] + "."
    return combined

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
